caption: A man with a tall, grey, pointed hairstyle and glasses sits in a studio setting, wearing a white dress shirt, a red bow tie, and light-colored suspenders. He wears large black headphones and speaks into a professional microphone positioned to his left. The background consists of a wall decorated with various framed photographs and posters, including some with the text "LEE". To the right, there is a white shelf containing a white box and other equipment. On-screen graphics include a circular logo on the left that reads "PODCAST" and a red text logo on the right that reads "BOSS TALK 101". Throughout the sequence, the man remains in the same position, speaking and gesturing with his right hand, which moves from being out of frame to slightly raised as he continues his conversation.
